RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0007 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Noor Smith Date of Birth: 23/01/1991 SSN (tokenized): TKN-413932 Annual Income: $159,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $10,000 Term (months): 60 Branch: Pune Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN72016AL Tesla Corolla 2023 EV New 24,000 VIN19631AL Nissan F-150 2017 EV CPO 45,000 Authorized Signature: Noor Smith
